name: SUPERNUMERARY KIDNEY
definition: aberrant division of nephrogenic cord into two metanephric tails (rare)

demographics.Associated with: horseshoe kidney, vaginal atresia, duplicated female urethra, duplicated penis
demographics.Location: most commonly on left side of abdomen caudal to normal kidney

dominant_finding: supernumerary ureter may insert into ipsilateral kidney / directly into bladder / ectopic site
distribution: most commonly on left side of abdomen caudal to normal kidney
discriminating_features: supernumerary ureter may insert into ipsilateral kidney / directly into bladder / ectopic site

general: supernumerary ureter may insert into ipsilateral kidney / directly into bladder / ectopic site

clinical.Cx: hydronephrosis, pyonephrosis, pyelonephritis, cysts, calculi, carcinoma, papillary
